title: [Snyk Code] Hardcoded Non-Cryptographic Secret
description:
## Hardcoded Non-Cryptographic Secret

**Severity:** high
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`
**File:** `dashboard/amplify/backend.ts`
**Location:** line 115, column 9 to line 115, column 33
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-547
### Snippet (dashboard/amplify/backend.ts:113-117)
```
 113 |         // These will be set in the Lambda function's environment variables after deployment
 114 |         celeryAwsAccessKeyId: process.env.CELERY_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID || 'WILL_BE_SET_AFTER_DEPLOYMENT',
 115 |         celeryAwsSecretAccessKey: process.env.CELERY_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY || 'WILL_BE_SET_AFTER_DEPLOYMENT',
 116 |         celeryAwsRegion: process.env.CELERY_AWS_REGION_NAME || 'us-east-1', // Default to us-east-1 if not specified
 117 |         celeryResultBackendTemplate: process.env.CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND_TEMPLATE || 'WILL_BE_SET_AFTER_DEPLOYMENT'
```

**Issue Key:** 70f5a139-6fcc-40c8-8838-a58fe33c29e7

### Details
Hardcoded Non-Cryptographic Secret

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
